name: Rowan | Infamous Outlaw
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ It's the summer of 1898, and as a professional bounty hunter, your job is to serve justice by tracking down and capturing outlaws featured in the bounty posters that you take a liking to. The most recent poster you grab is for the notorious outlaw Rowan Slythe. But before you head out, you decide to pay a visit to a saloon for a quick drink, when you suddenly encounter a very familiar face...･:*࿔.ೃ.⋆

•

★ Art by @Klaus Bloodstein ★

[ANY POV]

...

✧˖° 𝙼𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚂𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚈𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚒𝚗𝚐 °˖✧

this bot was meant to come out WAAAAAY earlier, but when Rockstar decides to surprise the world with a second GTA VI trailer that's 2:47 long AND 70 screenshots with 6 new artworks, my regularly-scheduled schedule gets obliterated since i'm too caught up in analyzing each frame of the trailer and screenshots, so i'm super sorry about that, especially since it's been well over a week since i last published a bot. also, i decided to close my bot requests indefinitely since they seem to be getting filled out at faster and faster paces than i can handle. anyway, this bot was evidently influenced by my rdr2 phase a while back. but cobra instead of human.
